info.name: Vantage AI — Public API
info.description:
Public free endpoints for the Vantage AI job-prep platform. No auth required for the free tools (cover letter roast, rejection email decoder, ghost job detector, search suggest). Paid endpoints (full prep pack) are not yet GA — they're listed under the 'planned' folder for forward compatibility.

Operator: Giovanni Sizino Ennes (UK sole trader)
Web: https://aimvantage.uk
Docs: https://aimvantage.uk/docs/api
Trust audit: https://aimvantage.uk/receipts
OpenAPI: https://aimvantage.uk/openapi.json

request.description:
Roast a pasted cover letter. Free public endpoint, no auth, rate-limited 30/5min/IP. Returns a multi-line roast and a 0-5 severity score.

Reference: https://aimvantage.uk/roast

Translate a rejection email into the recruiter's actual meaning. Returns verdict, severity, translation, specific clues, and a next move. Free public endpoint.

Reference: https://aimvantage.uk/decode-rejection

Score how likely a job listing is a ghost job. Returns ghostProbability (0-100), verdict, summary, tells, yourMove. Free public endpoint.

Reference: https://aimvantage.uk/ghost-job-check
OpenSearch suggestions endpoint. Returns the JSON shape: [query, [labels], [descriptions], [urls]]. Used by browsers that have added Vantage as a search provider via /opensearch.xml.

item.name: Planned (not yet GA)
item.description: These endpoints are documented for forward compatibility. They will require OAuth and consume tokens when they ship. Email hello@aimvantage.uk subject 'API early access' to be notified.

request.description:
PLANNED — not yet GA. Will create a full prep pack and consume 1 token. Idempotency-Key required.

Reference: https://aimvantage.uk/markdown/api.md
